creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
The results in comment 2 are on my CURRENT box with poudriere-devel-3.1.99.20151204 and a current ports tree.

I also replicated this on my 10.2 desktop with poudriere-3.1.10_1 and both the codeigniter22-2.2.6 build from www/codeigniter22 and codeigniter-3.0.3 build from www/codeigniter.  I am seeing Poudriere use use the correct PHP dependencies while building the package.
